content.en:
Soon.

The Ten Elements Ancestor summoned one disciple after another and gave him the opportunity.

And Ye Tian, as the fifth pro-line, was naturally the fifth to be summoned in and given the opportunity alone.

"Master. "

Ye Tian said respectfully.

The Ten Elements Ancestor glanced at Ye Tian and nodded slightly: "It's not bad, it's already a Five Realms-level controller, but it's not enough, you still need to work hard." "

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Ten Elements Ancestor said again: "Your current body under control is the eighth order, and your will is the late ninth order, and the changes in many Dao aspects can only be slowly comprehended. Therefore, if you want to improve your strength in a short period of time, you can only start from the aspect of control and will. Do you want to improve your will, or do you want to control your body?"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, and then said, "Master, I choose to improve my will. "

In terms of the will and the body of control, the will is the most difficult to improve, and the body of control is better.

Moreover, he was already an eighth-level mastery body, and if he devoured another special life, he could even raise the mastery body to the ninth-level, but if the will wanted to be raised from the late ninth order to the ninth-order peak, it would be too difficult.

Therefore, he still chose to improve his will.

"If you improve your will, you will be given this opportunity as a teacher. "

I saw that the Ten Elements Ancestor took out a leaf, which was filled with a killing aura and filled with a strange black, which made people feel very ominous.

"This is the Soul Killing Leaf, which I have refined, with the help of this Soul Killing Leaf, you can enter the God Killing Realm. "

Ten Elements of Ancestral Path.

"Master, what is the God Killing Realm?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

The Ten Elements Ancestor said: "The God Killing Realm is a very special world, and ordinary Eternal Controllers can't find the God Killing Realm at all, and they can't enter it. The God Slaying Realm is located in the area between the Third Boundary River and the Fourth Boundary River, which is the end of the realm you know. But the end of the realm is boundless, it is the territory of the life of the boundary river, but the edge of the boundary near the boundary river can still identify the direction, but the edge of the boundary area far away from the boundary river is very easy to get lost, and even the life of the boundary river will not go there easily. And in the vast and boundless realm, there are also some treasure lands, and the God Killing Realm is a special world. In the God Killing Realm, the true body cannot enter, only the soul will can enter it. Once you enter the God Killing Realm, you will recondense a physical body, which is equivalent to the physical body of an ordinary eternal master. There is only one way in the God Killing Realm, and that is the way of killing. Here, no matter how many Dao changes you master, you won't be able to perform them here. Under the influence of the way of killing, the creatures that enter here will continue to fight, and the Killing God Realm also has endless lives, and it can't be killed all the time. Therefore, if you are killed, you can reunite the divine body. The same is true for you, if you are killed in the God Killing Realm, you can reunite your body and continue to fight. "

"Endless fighting, every time you kill a living being, you will absorb a wisp of killing rules into your body, and use countless killing rules to sharpen your soul will, in this way to improve your will power, and finally break the shackles. "

"There is still a place like this!"

Ye Tian was a little interested.

He's not afraid to kill, and it's a way to sharpen himself.

So, he accepted the Soul Killing Leaf.

"With the guidance of the Soul Killing Leaf, you can find the God Killing Realm. As for how to return to the Origin Realm Sea in the future, with your ability, you can naturally get it back. "Ten Elements Ancestral Dao.

Ye Tian nodded, the fact that he had two true bodies couldn't hide it from the Ten Elements Ancestor of the Master.

With two true bodies, he won't get lost in the depths of the realm.

After bidding farewell to his master, Ye Tian went to the end of the realm between the No. 3 Boundary River and the No. 4 Boundary River.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the end of the realm here, and sensed the location of the Killing God Realm through the Soul Killing Leaf.

"It's over there. "

Ye Tian kept shuttling and flew far, far away.

At his speed, he flew a long distance, which showed how far away the God Killing Realm was from the Boundary River.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai really came to the God Killing Realm.

"It should be this position, but I can't sense the existence of the God Killing Realm, and I can only know that the God Killing Realm is here through the Soul Killing Leaf. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he urged the Soul Killing Leaf to enter the God Killing Realm.

Airplanes!!!!

A force enveloped him, and his soul will entered the Killing God Realm along the Soul Killing Leaf, and his true body, like the Killing God Realm, was hidden, so he didn't have to worry about the safety of the outside world.

......

Killing God Realm.

Ye Tian came here, and his soul will quickly reshaped a body, this body was extremely weak, compared to his body, it was much, many times weaker.

Before Ye Tian was familiar with this body, a powerful creature attacked.

These creatures are all strangely shaped, but they are all full of murderous aura, and some of them have many arms, each holding a weapon, and the body structure is like a killing machine, showing a terrifying power.

Ye Tianxia consciously wanted to use the Heavenly Imperial Body's origin control technique, but found that it was urging.

Only then did he remember the hint from his master.

The Killing God Realm only contains the way of killing, and the other paths are suppressed, so they can't perform the moves of other paths.

If you are here, you can also use the Dao carried by the body itself to perform various origin control techniques, as long as the energy of the body is not exhausted, it will not be affected.

However, at this moment, he only has the soul will come in, but the body has not entered, so he must abide by the rules here.

Of course, Ye Tian also reacted quickly.

He also controlled the way of killing, and naturally he would also control the time and space control technique of the way of killing, so his combat power was still very strong.

"Killing Finger!"

Ye Tian pointed and directly blasted the creatures away.

The strength of these creatures is not weak, they all have the strength of a domain-level controller, but they are still not Ye Tian's opponents.

"Kill the real body!"

"Spear of Killing!"

Ye Tian held the Killing Spear in his hand and kept fighting these creatures.

But soon, a large number of creatures gathered here, and Ye Tian's body did not contain endless power, so the power would be exhausted.

He didn't fall in love with the war, and retreated while fighting.

Soon.

The first creature was killed by Ye Tian, and a wisp of special killing rules entered Ye Tian's body, sharpening his soul will.

Of course, this killing rule is useless.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to fight with these creatures and sharpen his will.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, 300,000 realm river years had passed.
